### macOS

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `mermaid-local-editor-*-universal.dmg` | **Recommended.** Universal disk image (Apple Silicon + Intel). Open it and drag to Applications. |
| `mermaid-local-editor-*-universal.zip` | The same `.app`, zipped. |

> Unsigned build: on first launch, right-click the `.app` → "Open" to get past Gatekeeper.

### Windows

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `mermaid-local-editor-*-x64.exe` | NSIS installer for Intel/AMD 64-bit (most PCs). |
| `mermaid-local-editor-*-arm64.exe` | NSIS installer for Windows on ARM. |

> Unsigned build: if SmartScreen warns, choose "More info" → "Run anyway".

### Linux

Choose the file that matches your distro.

| File | Target |
|---|---|
| `mermaid-local-editor-*.AppImage` | Universal (all distros). Make it executable and run. |
| `mermaid-local-editor-*.deb` | Ubuntu / Debian family |
| `mermaid-local-editor-*.rpm` | AlmaLinux / RHEL / Fedora family |
| `mermaid-local-editor-*.pacman` | Arch family |

> All run fully offline (no extra network permissions, no outbound data).
